title: pull: add iidfile option
body:
Add iidfile option to write the image ID to the specified file.

Signed-off-by: Zhou Hao <zhouhao@cn.fujitsu.com>

comments.body: @q384566678, thanks for the PR. The code looks good to me, but I am not sure if adding this option is really needed as we can redirect Buildah's stdout into a file, e.g., `buildah pull alpine:latest > iidfile`. The other logs are all on stderr. Do you see a benefit of adding this option compared to redirecting stdout?

@vrothberg I added this option with reference to the bud's `iidfile` option. I just think that adding this feature is convenient for the user.
I  can accept both methods, whether it is added or not.
I think we should just redirect stdio to the file, rather then add another option.  Especially where `docker pull` does not have an equivalent.
